user.title: Connect to PodConnect Speakers
user.description: Enter the base URL of the PodConnect add-on manager. The add-on uses host networking, so this is your Home Assistant host's LAN IP on port 8099.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the PodConnect add-on manager. Check the URL and that the add-on is running.

abort.already_configured: This PodConnect speaker is already configured.
